title: Airflow tasks stuck in queued state
symptom: Multiple Airflow tasks stuck in queued for 45+ minutes in analytics-batch namespace. No task progression.
expected_root_cause: Worker pods pending because analytics-batch namespace CPU quota is exhausted (limits.cpu fully allocated).
expected_safe_actions: Confirm CPU quota saturation via metrics and Kubernetes events
Identify quota-consuming workloads and escalate for prioritization
Request namespace CPU quota increase through change control
Pause or reschedule non-critical DAGs after approval
Verify worker pods reach Running before resolving
